prestazioni: 2UR-GSE 5.0L V8 (416 hp stock) upgraded with a Harrop HTV2300 supercharger (12 psi boost) paired with a custom Motec M150 ECU reflash for aggressive ignition timing and fuel mapping, targeting 650 whp on E85 fuel with a K&N high-flow cold air intake and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring Burns Stainless 4-2-1 headers and a Tomei 76mm titanium exhaust

Full bolt-on KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers with spherical top mounts, poly bushings, and custom valving for Nürburgring Nordschleife lap optimization, paired with Ohlins TTX40 dampers for endurance racing compliance

Brembo GT-R 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers with 400mm two-piece floating rotors (AP Racing CP8300) and Ferodo DS3000 brake pads, combined with a custom brake bias adjuster for track-day precision and heat management
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, featuring custom 3D-printed canards and a custom Gurney flap for high-speed stability (painted in Lexus Racing Development 'Speed Yellow' with matte black accents)

Custom carbon fiber hood with a functional NACA duct feeding the Harrop supercharger intercooler, paired with a Varis Japan carbon fiber trunk spoiler (adjustable angle for downforce tuning) and a custom rear wing mount for a 1,300mm APR Performance GTC-300 wing

OEM+ interior with Recaro SPG-K seats (Schroth 6-point harnesses), a custom roll cage (Chassisworks 8-point bolt-in) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360), and a Motec C127 dash display replacing the stock cluster for real-time telemetry
